subject: [PATCH v2 037/110] minix: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: The reviewer noted that the patch correctly converts minix i_ino format strings to use the PRIino format macro, but did not provide any specific technical issues or concerns.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch is good and suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the minix file system to use the PRIino format for printing inode numbers, in preparation for the widening of i_ino via kino_t. This change affects various error messages and debug prints throughout the minix inode code. The update ensures consistency with other parts of the kernel that will be using the new format. The patch is part of a larger series of changes to the minix file system.
